sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 05:57 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem836_read_835_and_select_next.json')
status_in=prev.get('status')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='next_force_dispatch_result_probe':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem837_codex_self_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v8','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-837 force dispatch result proof with known Codex workflow','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif status_in=='next_repair_claude_runtime_state':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem837_claude_runtime_dispatch_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v8','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-837 repair runtime state by dispatching Claude dispatcher','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_dispatch_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, parse dispatch result, verify Claude runtime state'
elif status_in=='next_repair_real_claude_response':
    # Create a clear retry prompt for Claude once runtime is available; not counted as response.
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem837_claude_response_retry_dispatch.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v8','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-837 retry real Claude response after runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, verify runtime and real Claude response'
else:
    status='triad_or_unknown_no_queue_created'
    next_action='verify triad or diagnose unknown BEM-836 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-837','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem837_execute_bem836_next_action.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem837_execute_bem836_next_action.md').write_text('# BEM-837 | Execute BEM-836 Next Action | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem837_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-837'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem837_execute_bem836_next_action.json','governance/reports/bem837_execute_bem836_next_action.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem837_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-836 selected next action by queuing the appropriate dispatch probe for missing proof')
